text: Mixed Cations and Structural Complexity in (Eu. Cax)4In;Ge4 and (EuxCax) 3In Ges - The First Two Members of the Homologous Series Azin+mI2n+mGezn+m) (n, m = 1, 2,; A: Ca, Sr, Ba, Eu, or Yb). Eu1.23 Caz.77 ng Ge4 (I), Eu2.60 Ca1.40 n3Ge4 (Il), Euo.30Caz.70n2Gez (Ill), and Euo.66Ca234n2Ges (IV) are synthesized from the elements in a molten In metal flux (960 °C, 20 h). The compounds are characterized by single crystal XRD, magnetic susceptibility measurements, and TB-LMTO band structure calculations. (I) and (II) crystallize in the space group C2/m with Z = 2, and III) and (IV) in the space group Pnma with Z = 4. The polyanionic substructures of the compounds are based on InGe, edge-sharing tetrahedra, Gez dimers, and bridging In atoms in a nearly square planar environment. — (YOU, T.-S.; TOBASH, P. H.; BOBEV*, S.; Inorg. Chem. 49 (2010) 4, 1773-1783; Dep. Chem. Biochem., Univ. Del., Newark, DE 19716, USA; Eng.) W. Pewestorf
